info.title: Eleventh Press International Publishing — Public API
info.description: The public, external-facing surface of the platform: article discovery/browsing, OAI-PMH 2.0 harvesting, COUNTER 5 / SUSHI usage reporting, and OJS-compatible export. This covers only endpoints meant for third-party/programmatic consumption — the dashboard's internal editorial-workflow API is intentionally out of scope. There is currently one implicit, unversioned API surface (no /v1/ prefix); a breaking change to any endpoint documented here would be introduced as a new path rather than silently changing this one, until a real versioning scheme is adopted.

servers.description: Production (override via APP_BASE_URL if self-hosted on a custom domain)

tags.name: Discovery
tags.description: Keyless fan-out search across external scholarly APIs

tags.name: OJS export
tags.description: PKP Open Journal Systems Native XML export

get.description: Keyset-paginated, sortable, filterable list of PUBLISHED articles.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque keyset cursor from a previous response

get.summary: Get one published article's full detail
get.description: Non-published articles require the corresponding author's own session or editorial staff — not reachable anonymously.

404.description: Not found (or not published, for an anonymous request)

get.description: Implements Identify, ListMetadataFormats, ListRecords, ListIdentifiers, GetRecord, and ListSets over Dublin Core (oai_dc) records for every PUBLISHED article. Selective harvesting via from/until; pagination via resumptionToken.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Required for GetRecord — the oai:<host>:<articleId> identifier from a record's <header>

400.description: OAI-PMH error response (badVerb, badArgument, badResumptionToken, idDoesNotExist, noRecordsMatch)

get.description: Report_Response JSON per the COUNTER 5 Code of Practice. api_key is required whenever customer_id identifies a real institution (src/lib/institutions.ts verifySushiApiKey) — without it, or with a wrong key, the institution's usage data is not returned.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: Per-institution SUSHI key, required to read a real institution's own report

403.description: Missing or incorrect api_key for the given customer_id

get.summary: Fetch one COUNTER 5 SUSHI report by report ID
Keyless fan-out search across external scholarly APIs
get.description: Searches Crossref, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, ERIC, PubMed Central, Zenodo, and (when configured) CORE in parallel, deduplicated by DOI. Up to 5 results per source.

get.summary: ReDIF template feed for RePEc's harvester
Full journal export — PKP Native XML format
get.description: Every issue with at least one published article, wrapped in an <issues> root — the shape PKP's admin guide recommends for bulk import.

get.summary: One issue export — PKP Native XML format
One article export — PKP Native XML format
